name: Valid Configuration Paren
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})", "%{paren set}%{paren set}", ""]
terminals = [""]

name: Valid Configuration Paren Small Stack
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})", "%{paren set}%{paren set}", ""]
terminals = ["term"]
output: (term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)

name: Valid Configuration Janet Small Stack
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "janet"
transition ='''(print "trans")''' 
terminal = '''(print "term")'''
output: (term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)
(term)

name: Valid Configuration Janet
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "janet"
transition ='''(print "trans")''' 
terminal = '''(print "term")'''
output: (trans)

name: Valid Configuration Range Single Int
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "range"
lower_bound = 10
upper_bound = 10

name: Valid Configurations Range Full
lang:
[[production]]
name = "entry"
type = "pure"
transitions = ["(%{paren set})"]
terminals = [""]

[[production]]
name = "paren set"
type = "range"
lower_bound = -10
upper_bound = 10
